zh.Bramall Hall, Bramhall, Wrenbury, Cheshi: 英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾
zh.Salemone, Vilanculos, Inhambane, Mozambi: 莫三比克音哈巴維藍洛斯薩萊蒙
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Mary Salemon於1228年出生在英國爾維頓時，她的父親Robert Salemon of Withington18歲，母親Beatrix de Hulme23歲。她於大約1245年與Sir Roger Davenport在英國爾斯維頓哈姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1301年7月2日之前在英國爾達文波特，埋葬在莫三比克音哈巴維藍洛斯薩萊蒙。

zh-hans.Bramall Hall, Bramhall, Wrenbury, Cheshi: 英国英格兰爾布拉哈爾
zh-hans.Salemone, Vilanculos, Inhambane, Mozambi: 莫桑比克音哈巴維藍洛斯薩萊蒙
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Mary Salemon于1228年出生在英国爾維頓时，她的父亲Robert Salemon of Withington18岁，母亲Beatrix de Hulme23岁。她于大约1245年与Sir Roger Davenport在英国爾斯維頓哈姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1301年7月2日之前在英国爾達文波特，埋葬在莫桑比克音哈巴維藍洛斯薩萊蒙。

nameMeanings.name: Salemon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Akiva, Maier, Mayer, Moshe, Tali, Tziporah, Uzi, Yehuda.

Jewish, Hungarian, German, Dutch, Polish, and English (Middlesex); Czech and Slovak (also Šalamon); Slovenian and Croatian (mainly Šalamon): from the personal name Salamon or Šalamon, local variant or equivalent of Solomon or, as in the case of the Slovenian name, of Salomon .
Italian: from a northeastern regional variant of the personal name   Salamone   ‘Solomon’.

variants.name: Salak
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Wasyl, Zofia.
Czech and Hungarian (Salák); Slovak (also Salák, Šalak, Šalák): from a pet form of the personal name Salamon , in Slovak also Šalamon (see Solomon ).
Polish: patronymic from a short form of the personal name   Salomon   or   Salamon   (see   Solomon  ).

variants.name: Solomon
meanings: Jewish, English, Scottish, Dutch, Swedish, French, Portuguese, Romanian, Ethiopian, and Eritrean; Spanish (Solomón): from a vernacular form of the Biblical Hebrew personal name Shelomo, a derivative of shalom ‘peace’. The name Solomon has for generations been a popular Jewish name and was also fairly widespread in the Middle Ages among Christians. In the Bible it is the name of King David's successor, noted for his wisdom; among Christians it was therefore also used as a nickname for a man who was considered wise. The spelling Solomon is used in the King James Bible of 1611, which is why this is the standard form of the name in modern English, but spellings with Sal- were more usual across continental Europe, the 1534 Lutheran Bible rendering it as Salomo and the 1560 Geneva Bible as Salomon . From the 7th century the spelling Salomon is recorded as a Christian personal name in France, where it was the name of several saints including a Breton king martyred in 874. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages (see Salomon , Salamon ). See also Salmon 1. — Note: Since Ethiopians and Eritreans do not have hereditary surnames, the Ethiopian and Eritrean name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Saliga
meanings: Slovak (Šaliga): perhaps a derivative of a short form of the old personal name Šalamún (see Salamon ). Alternatively, it may be of Polish origin (see below).

In some cases also an Americanized form of Polish Sałyga: nickname from the dialect noun sałyga ‘kind of dish usually made of saltbush’ or verb sałygać ‘to eat with relish’; less probably a derivative of a short form of the personal name Salamon . This surname is mainly found in Masovian Voivodeship.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Mary Salemon was born in 1228, in Withington, Cheshire, England, her father, Robert Salemon of Withington, was 18 and her mother, Beatrix de Hulme, was 23. She married Sir Roger Davenport about 1245, in Swettenham, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 2 July 1301, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, and was buried in Salemone, Vilanculos, Inhambane, Mozambique.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Mary Salemon est née en 1228, à Withington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Salemon of Withington, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Hulme, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger Davenport environ 1245, à Swettenham, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 2 juillet 1301, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Salemone, Vilanculos, Inhambane, Mozambique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Mary Salemon 1228 in Withington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Salemon of Withington 18 und ihre Mutter Beatrix de Hulme 23. Sie hat um 1245 in Swettenham, Cheshire, England Sir Roger Davenport geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 2. Juli 1301 in Davenport, Cheshire, England und wurde in Salemone, Vilanculos, Inhambane, Mosambik begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Salemon è nata il nel 1228 nel Withington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Robert Salemon of Withington, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Beatrix de Hulme, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger Davenport circa 1245, nel Swettenham, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 2 luglio 1301, nel Davenport, Cheshire, England, e fu sepolta a Salemone, Vilanculos, Inhambane, Mozambico.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Salemonが1228年にイギリスチェシュアイアウィスイントンで生まれた時，父Robert Salemon of Withingtonは18歳，母Beatrix de Hulmeは23歳であった。約1245年にイギリスチェシュアイアスウエッテンハムでSir Roger Davenportと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1301年7月2日以前にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで死去し，モザンビークインハンバンヴィランクウロスサレモンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Salemon(이)가 1228년 영국 체실르 위스잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Salemon of Withington(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix de Hulme(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1245년 영국 체실르 스베텐함에서 Sir Roger Davenport(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 7월 2일 이전 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 사망했으며 모잠비크 인함반 빌랭컬스 살일몬에 묻혔다.

mn.Bramall Hall, Bramhall, Wrenbury, Cheshi: Bramhall, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Mary Salemon nasceu em 1228, em Withington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Salemon of Withington, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Hulme, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger Davenport aproximadamente 1245, em Swettenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 2 de julho de 1301, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Salemone, Vilanculos, Inhambane, Moçambique.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Mary Salemon родилась в 1228 г. в местности витингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Salemon of Withington было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Hulme, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger Davenport около 1245 г. в местности светтенам, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 2 июля 1301 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия и была похоронена в местности сеилемоун, виланкулос, инамбан, Мозамбик.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Mary Salemon nació en 1228, en Withington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Salemon of Withington, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Hulme, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Roger Davenport aproximadamente 1245, en Swettenham, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 2 de julio de 1301, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Salemone, Vilanculos, Inhambane, Mozambique.
